displayTitle: Agent of the Empire #01: Iron Eclipse, Part 1
synopsis: The name's Cross. Jahan Cross. Move over, James Bond; there's a new secret agent in the galaxy, and he has the weight of the Empire behind him! Cross's mission takes him and his assistant IN-GA 44 to the affluent Corporate Sector. There, on the trail of stolen droid technology, they will rub elbows with diplomats and desperadoes, captains of industry and sergeants of the local police--and rub most of them the wrong way! * A view of the Star Wars galaxy from inside the Empire! * The author of the best-selling Star Wars: Legacy and Star Wars: Republic returns!
title: Agent of the Empire #01: Iron Eclipse, Part 1
